---
title: "About this MS"
editor: source
---

Collaborative manuscript

Title: Title

Author 1^1,2^, Author 2^1^, Author 3^1^

^1^ Grupo Ecologia de Rios do Semiárido, Laboratório de Ecologia,  
Centro de Ciências Biológicas e Sociais Aplicadas,  
Universidade Estadual da Paraíba – UEPB,  
Rua Horácio Trajano, s/n, CEP 58070-450,  
João Pessoa, PB, Brasil

^2^ Corresponding author: Author Name, authoremail@hotmail.com

Author e-mails:  
Author 2: authoremail@hotmail.com  
Author 3: authoremail@hotmail.com
